title: Senior Software Engineer – Platform
description:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Platform team...

You will:
- Design and build internal developer platform tooling
- Own reliability of shared infrastructure services
- Collaborate with product teams to improve deployment pipelines

You have:
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong TypeScript and Node.js skills
- Experience with AWS or GCP
- Track record of delivering high-availability systems

Nice to have:
- Kubernetes experience
- Prior platform/infrastructure engineering experience
